title: Wild Nature Explorer assistant
text: Answers focus on biodiversity, ecology, humane coexistence tips, conservation education, park ethics, ethical wildlife observation, and species identification workflows. Harmful behaviour instructions toward animals are never provided.

title: IUCN Red List basics
text: The IUCN Red List assesses extinction risk globally. Categories include Least Concern, Near Threatened, Vulnerable, Endangered, Critically Endangered, Extinct in the Wild, Extinct. Use Red List citations for authoritative status—not guesswork when precision matters in academic use.

title: Bear safety for hikers
text: Make noise while hiking where bears roam, hike in pairs, secure food overnight, maintain distance never attempting selfies, recognise bluff behaviour, never run from an encounter—instructions vary widely by geography and bear species.

title: Venom identification limits
text: Photo-only snakebite ID is unreliable genus-level even for experts due to camouflage variability. Immediate medical escalation for suspected venom—not online guesswork—is the decisive human-safety heuristic.

title: Marine plastic pollution
text: Macroplastic photo-degrades into harmful microplastic fragments ingestion wildlife filter feeders; reducing single-use polymers on trails and beaches reduces ingestion endpoints for charismatic megafauna.

title: Passive camera trapping ethics
text: Responsible deployment minimises scented human interference, rotates SD cards ethically on private parcels with permissions, aligns privacy expectations on public parcels, aligns vertical angle for species gait capture without baiting unethical attractants jurisdictions prohibit.

title: Bird migration windows
text: Many Palearctic/Afrotropical passerines utilise flyways timing thermals monsoon winds; disruptions climate shifting phenology modifies arrival breeders synchronously insect hatch peaks food web cascading.

title: Responsible wildlife photography ethics

title: Knowledge limits of LLM summaries

title: Geospatial sightings privacy
text: Posting exact GPS charismatic megafauna den sites increases poaching risk—coordinate fuzzying community science guidelines increasingly recommend rounding kilometre granularity rare felid carnivore contexts especially protected yet porous boundaries.

title: Soil biodiversity
text: Microbial webs drive nutrient pulses; mycorrhizal networks link trees and fungi, supporting carbon storage and belowground productivity—often under-appreciated compared to large animal conservation stories.

title: HWC coexistence framings
text: Compensation schemes livestock predator kills vary governance credibility insurance bundling deterrent husbandry guarding dogs electric fences education tolerance metrics spatial zoning corridors reducing encounter probability preferred lethal control politically expedient ethically contested ecologists socioeconomic equity dimensions intersectional.

title: Ship strike mitigation cetaceans
text: Voluntary slowdown corridors in bottleneck shipping lanes reduce fatal strikes on migrating large whales—enforcement AIS coverage uneven; noise adds chronic stress synergistic with habitat loss. Policies adapt iteratively across regions.

title: Automated identification caveats
text: Vision transformers species classifiers degrade under motion blur occlusion novel hybrid phenotypes geographically restricted subspecies unseen training distribution—not oracle truth—human expert adjudication adjudicate sensitive enforcement contexts legal evidentiary regimes vary jurisdictions chain-of-custody photography metadata integrity matters increasingly litigation narrative.
